inputs.label: Kilometers
inputs.businessContext: Distance in kilometers to convert to miles.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance in kilometers to convert to miles.
businessContext_i18n.de: Entfernung in Kilometern zur Umrechnung in Meilen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance en kilomètres à convertir en miles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia en kilómetros a convertir a millas.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from kilometers to miles. Standard is 0.621371. Customize if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor from kilometers to miles. Standard is 0.621371. Customize if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilometreden mile dönüşüm faktörü. Standart 0,621371'dir. Gerekirse özelleştirin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor von Kilometern in Meilen. Standard ist 0,621371. Bei Bedarf anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion des kilomètres en miles. Standard : 0,621371. Personnalisez si nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión de kilómetros a millas. El estándar es 0.621371. Personalícelo si es necesario.

inputs.label: Rounding Decimals
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the result.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucu yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado.

inputs.label: Use Scientific Notation
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to output result in scientific notation (e.g., 1.23e+2). 0 for standard decimal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to output result in scientific notation (e.g., 1.23e+2). 0 for standard decimal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucu bilimsel gösterimde (örn. 1,23e+2) çıkarmak için 1 ayarlayın. Standart ondalık için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, um das Ergebnis in wissenschaftlicher Notation auszugeben (z. B. 1,23e+2). 0 für Standard-Dezimaldarstellung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour afficher le résultat en notation scientifique (ex. 1,23e+2). 0 pour la décimale standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para mostrar el resultado en notación científica (ej. 1.23e+2). 0 para decimal estándar.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
